title: Adjustments that you show on the supplementary section of your tax return 2018
description: Instructions for completing adjustments in the supplementary tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, adjustments, supplementary, 2018, tax return, family trust, family trust distribution, paper tax return, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: Did you receive a distribution during 2017–18 on which family trust distribution tax has been paid?

rows: Read question A5 Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid 2018 . You may be entitled to an adjustment, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2018 .

content_blocks.text: Did you make a payment to us more than 14 days before the due date for payment?

rows: Read question C1 Credit for interest on early payments 2018 . You may be able to claim credit for interest on early payments, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2018 .
Go to M1 Medicare levy reduction or exemption 2018 .

content_text:
## Completing your tax return
Did you receive a distribution during 2017–18 on which family trust distribution tax has been paid?
Yes | Read question A5 Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid 2018 . You may be entitled to an adjustment, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2018 .
No | Read on.
Did you make a payment to us more than 14 days before the due date for payment?
Yes | Read question C1 Credit for interest on early payments 2018 . You may be able to claim credit for interest on early payments, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2018 .
No | Go to M1 Medicare levy reduction or exemption 2018 .
